name: Iter18 — GitHub 404 PR shows user-friendly error, app does not crash
description: When a user submits a valid-format GitHub PR URL that does not exist (404), the app displays a clear error message and remains usable — no blank screen, no uncaught exception, input field is still interactive.

planSteps.description: Type https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/999999 into the PR input field
Verify a visible error message appears explaining the PR was not found or could not be loaded — no blank page, no generic JS error
Verify the PR input field is still visible and interactive so the user can try a different URL
